text:
I keep digging into this style, trying to combine these elements:

• Fat felt-tip pen brush strokes
• 3D cel shading
• 2D texture painting

there's still an issue with her arm, but I'm getting closer and closer to exactly what I want https://t.co/1udjFzL7JP
